name: Research Capsules
effect: Grants 1% (2% if  Rodger) Research on a certain Twisted. Two capsules spawn per Twisted on the Floor you're on (corresponding to said Twisted and informing the player of which), and two  Ichor is earned for picking one up.

name: Tapes
effect: Adds 5 Tapes to your tape counter, which can be used to purchase other items from  Dandy's Shop in the Elevator before starting an even Floor. These can also be used to heal others as  Sprout or  Ginger, to heal yourself as  Teagan, or to place down decoys as  Blot.

name: Gumballs
effect: Upon use, boosts a random stat by 10% for 5 seconds. (9 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.) 3 usages

name: Chocolate
effect: Upon use, increases Max Stamina by 25 and Walk Speed by 10% for 10 seconds. (14 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Stopwatch
effect: While extracting a Machine, increases Skill Check window size by 50 for 15 seconds. (Cannot be used when not extracting a Machine.)

name: Stamina Candy
effect: Upon use, increases Stamina Regeneration by 50% for 20 seconds. (24 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Stealth Candy
effect: Upon use, increases Stealth by 25% for 8 seconds. (12 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Pop
effect: Upon use, grants 45 Stamina.

name: Speed Candy
effect: Upon use, increases Walk and Run Speed by 25% for 5 seconds. (9 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Protein Bar
effect: Upon use, increases Stamina Regeneration by 150% for 15 seconds, equivalent to +6 stamina per second for most Toons.

name: Instructions
effect: While extracting a Machine, increases Extraction Speed by 100% for 10 seconds upon use. (Cannot be used when not extracting a Machine.)

name: Extraction Speed Candy
effect: While extracting a Machine, increases Extraction Speed by 50% for 5 seconds upon use. (9 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Skill Check Candy
effect: Upon use, increases Skill Check chance by 25% for 15 seconds. (19 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Jumper Cable
effect: While extracting a Machine, adds a large amount of completion upon use. (33%) (Cannot be used when not extracting a Machine.)

name: Bandage
effect: Upon use, restores 1 .

name: Air Horn
effect: Upon use, drastically decreases Stealth by 50 for 10 seconds and alerts nearby + specific Twisteds to your current location.

name: Jawbreaker
effect: Upon use, you gain a random 50% effect for 20 seconds. (24 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: BonBon
effect: Use this item to increase Extraction Speed +50% and Movement Speed +25% for 10 seconds. (14 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)

name: Christmas Cookie
effect: Use this Item to create a pulse that increases the Movement Speed of Toons around you by 15% for 10 seconds

name: Dandy Easter Egg
effect: Can't be bought or obtained normally, can only be obtained from a basket by Dandy's Shop for free during an Easter Event or, obtained from "Lost and Found" or "Blind Grab" Cards.

name: Bottle o' Pop
effect: Upon use, refills your Stamina to full capacity.

name: Health Kit
effect: Upon use, restores  to the maximum.

name: Box o' Chocolates
effect: Upon use, increases Max Stamina by 25, and Run Speed by 10% for 10 seconds. (14 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.) Can be used 5 times.

name: Eject Button
effect: Upon use, increases Stealth by 15 points, Walk and Run Speed by 25 for 3 seconds, and removes the Slow Debuff, if you have it.

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: While being chased by a Twisted, make it lose interest in you for 3 seconds. (You cannot be hurt during this time.) (Does not work on Lethal Twisteds.)

name: Valve
effect: While extracting a Machine, instantly completes it upon use. (Cannot be used when not extracting a Machine.)

name: Ornaments
effect: Adds 5 Ornaments to the ornaments counter, which could be used to purchase Christmas Event Toons, Skins, or Stickers from Bobette's Store, which was found in the lobby. Two  Ornaments would spawn on each Floor.

name: Baskets
effect: Adds 5 Baskets to the baskets counter, which could be used to purchase Easter Event Toons, Skins, or Stickers from Bassie's Store, which was found in the lobby. Two  Baskets would spawn on each Floor.

name: Pumpkins
effect: Adds 5 Pumpkins to the pumpkins counter, which will be used to purchase Halloween Event Toons, Skins, or Stickers from Gourdy's Store, which will be found in the lobby. Two  Pumpkins will spawn on each Floor.

name: Enigma Candy
effect: Upon use, you would gain a random 50% effect for 10 seconds. With Extraction and SkillCheck being less likely. (Would've been 14 seconds with Glazed Fondant Bag.)
